do_not_claim: Quantified forecast, fiscal savings, proven causation

minimum_evidence_needed: Game map + audit trail + source-informed demonstrative model + validation plan
Public evidence + options analysis + model caveats + stakeholder validation plan
Conceptual/theoretical argument + policy context + transparent limitations
Model structure + audit + standards crosswalk + validation pathway
Stakeholder validation + targeted empirical checks + fiscal modelling/pilot results
Pilot/evaluation evidence + operational design + data governance + equity review
do_not_claim: System can implement without unintended effects
